title: Placement v1
description: A Firestore document from the placements collection (default DB, rainbow-me project). Schema version 1.

screen.description: Which screen this placement appears on

enabled.description: Whether this placement is active; only true documents are queried

order.description: Sort order among placements on the same screen

version.description: Schema version; must be 1 for v1 documents

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp stored as a string (not a Firestore Timestamp)

items.description: Ordered list of items in this placement; pre-sorted by item.order

id.description: Source-specific identifier; Hyperliquid synthetic assets are prefixed with 'xyz:'
